content: We can transform generic autonomous AI agents into self-evolving agents by integrating the Self-Refine iterative self-feedback framework, enabling agents to improve their long-term autonomous task performance without external oversight or additional supervised training data. This creates a closed-loop self-improvement cycle where agents not only act independently but also continuously refine their own action strategies based on self-generated feedback, similar to how human agents hone their skills through iterative self-reflection after completing tasks.
